item.name: Raleigh_Park_Restrooms
item.title: Raleigh Park Restrooms
item.description:
This dataset provides a spatial representation of comfort stations (restrooms) within City of Raleigh Parks and Greenways. Each feature is represented as a non-survey grade point feature. This dataset is suitable for cartographic representation and as an input for further analysis. 

This layer is a hosted view of the RaleighPRCR Raleigh Park Asset_MASTER
item.snippet: A public read-only view of the Raleigh Park Assets master layer filtered to show restrooms/comfort stations.
item.accessInformation: City of Raleigh Parks, Recreation and Cultural Resources
